items.name: Comfort Colors - Garment-Dyed Heavyweight T-Shirt - 1717 (DTF)
items.description:
Elevate your casual wardrobe with the Comfort Colors® Garment-Dyed Heavyweight T-Shirt (1717). Crafted from 100% ring-spun cotton, this premium tee combines soft, breathable fabric with a garment-dyed process for a lived-in, vintage feel and minimal shrinkage. Perfect for those who appreciate both comfort and durability, this shirt is ideal for everyday wear and long-lasting style.

Fabric & Composition

  • Weight: 6.1 oz./yd² (US) | 10 oz/L yd (CA) – providing a substantial yet comfortable feel
  • Material: 100% ring-spun cotton with 30 singles for superior softness and durability
  • Garment-Dyed Process: Creates a rich, vintage look with shades that remain vibrant for the life of the garment and ensures minimal shrinkage after washing

Fit & Features

  • Relaxed Fit: Designed for a comfortable, laid-back fit that’s perfect for all-day wear
  • Topstitched Rib Collar: Classic width for durability and a clean finish
  • Shoulder-to-Shoulder Twill Tape: Reinforces the shirt for added strength and comfort
  • Signature Twill Label: Adds a touch of premium craftsmanship to the design

Sustainability & Ethical Manufacturing

  • Proud Member of the U.S. Cotton Trust Protocol, supporting sustainable cotton farming practices
  • Made with OEKO-TEX® Certified Low-Impact Dyes, ensuring responsible production and reducing environmental impact
  • Pigment Dye Process: Offers a vintage look and feel, with salt-free pigments for cleaner dyeing and more sustainable colors
  • Socially Conscious Manufacturing:
    • Made in facilities partnered with the Fair Labor Association to ensure fair working conditions
    • WRAP-Certified, upholding high standards of social and environmental responsibility

Dyeing Details

  • Pigment-Dye Colors: Provide a rich, lived-in aesthetic that will last through the life of the garment. The pigment dye process attaches insoluble color particles to the fabric’s surface, creating a unique, slightly faded look.
  • Reactive-Dye Colors: Offer a more traditional dyed appearance, retaining the same softness and durability.
  • Note: Some colors are transitioning from Reactive/Direct Dye to Pigment Dye, so inventory may be mixed during this period.
    • Reactive Dye Colors: Black, Chili, China Blue, Granite, Graphite, Midnight, Mystic Blue, Paprika, Red, Sage, Sapphire, Topaz Blue, True Navy, and White.
    • Pigment Dye Colors: Banana, Chambray, Island Green, Lagoon Blue, Sapphire, Terracotta, and Washed Denim.

With its premium cotton fabric, vintage-inspired dye process, and commitment to sustainability, the Comfort Colors® Garment-Dyed Heavyweight T-Shirt offers a timeless, eco-conscious choice that you’ll enjoy wearing for years to come.

items.name: Gildan - Softstyle® T-Shirt - 64000 (DTF)
items.description:
Experience the perfect combination of comfort, style, and sustainability with the Gildan Softstyle® 64000. Designed with 100% ring-spun cotton, this lightweight 4.5 oz./yd² (US) / 7.5 oz./L yd (CA) t-shirt offers a super-soft feel and high stitch density, ensuring a smooth printing surface for vibrant designs.

Key Features:

✔ Ultra-Soft & Lightweight: Made with premium 30-singles ring-spun cotton for superior softness and breathability.
✔ Premium Fabric Blends for Select Colors:

  • Solid Colors: 100% ring-spun cotton
  • Antique Colors & Sport Grey: 90/10 cotton/polyester
  • Dark Heather & Heather Colors: 65/35 polyester/cotton
  • Graphite Heather: 50/50 cotton/polyester
    ✔ Modern Classic Fit: A contemporary yet comfortable silhouette suitable for all body types.
    ✔ Built for Durability & Comfort: Features a narrow rib collar, taped neck and shoulders, and a tear-away label for added convenience.
    ✔ Eco-Friendly & Ethically Made:
  • Certified with OEKO-TEX Standard 100, ensuring low-impact dyes and sustainable manufacturing.
  • Produced in WRAP-certified facilities and in partnership with the Fair Labor Association for socially responsible manufacturing.
  • Supports Better Cotton Initiative (BCI) to promote sustainable cotton farming.
    ✔ Unique Natural Fabric Option: The "Natural" colorway is undyed, showcasing cotton’s natural fibers with visible specks and seeds.

items.name: Gildan - Heavy Cotton™ T-Shirt - 5000 (DTF)
items.description:
Made with 100% U.S. cotton and enhanced with the latest innovations in fabric technology, this 5.3 oz./yd² (US) / 8.8 oz./L yd (CA) t-shirt delivers a classic fit with long-lasting comfort. Whether for casual wear, custom printing, or promotional use, this tee is designed to perform.

Premium Fabric Composition:

✔ 100% cotton, 20 singles for a soft yet sturdy feel
✔ Blended options for enhanced versatility:

  • 50/50 cotton/polyester – Blackberry, Dark Heather, Graphite Heather, Heather Colors, Lilac, Midnight, Neon Colors, Safety Colors, Sunset & Tweed
  • 90/10 cotton/polyester – Antique Colors & Sport Grey
  • 99/1 cotton/polyester – Ash Grey
    ✔ Safety Green meets ANSI / ISEA 107 high-visibility standards

Key Features:

✔ Classic Fit & Timeless Style: A relaxed silhouette with a ribbed collar for a polished look
✔ Enhanced Comfort & Durability: Taped neck and shoulders ensure long-lasting wear
✔ Tear-Away Label: Customization-ready for ultimate convenience
✔ Improved Printability: High-quality fabric construction enhances screen printing results
✔ Eco-Friendly & Ethically Made:

  • Crafted with OEKO-TEX® certified low-impact dyes
  • Proudly made with U.S. Cotton Trust Protocol standards for sustainable cotton sourcing
  • Produced in WRAP-certified facilities and in partnership with the Fair Labor Association

Naturally Unique:

The "Natural" color option is unbleached and undyed, preserving the cotton’s raw texture with visible fibers and specks.

items.name: BELLA + CANVAS  - Jersey Tee - 3001 (DTF)
items.description:
Our best-selling Unisex Jersey Short Sleeve Tee is the perfect blend of comfort, quality, and versatility. Designed with a classic crew neck and tailored fit, this everyday essential is available in an impressive 86 colors to suit any style.

Made from our proprietary Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton, this ultra-soft tee offers a smooth, high-quality surface ideal for printing, ensuring vibrant and long-lasting designs. Whether for casual wear, branding, or custom prints, this tee delivers premium feel and performance.

Key Features:

✔ Unmatched Softness: Crafted from 100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton, 32 singles, 4.2 oz. for a lightweight yet durable feel
✔ Flawless Fit & Comfort:

  • Classic fit for a relaxed yet polished look
  • Side-seamed construction for a structured silhouette
  • Shoulder taping for added durability
    ✔ Versatile Unisex Sizing: Available from XS to 5XL, ensuring the perfect fit for everyone
    ✔ Premium Printability: Ultra-smooth fabric surface enhances screen printing and customization results
    ✔ Fabric Variations:
  • Ash: 99% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton, 1% polyester

Perfect for Any Occasion

Whether you're designing for custom printing, everyday wear, or retail, the Unisex Jersey Short Sleeve Tee offers exceptional comfort, durability, and style—making it a must-have staple in any wardrobe.

items.name: Gildan - Light Cotton T-Shirt - 3000
items.description:
Crafted for comfort and superior printability, the Gildan® Light Cotton collection is designed with the latest breakthrough in soft cotton technology. Made from 100% U.S. cotton, this lightweight fabric ensures a smooth, high-quality feel that stands out.

Fabric Details:

  • 4.45 oz./yd² (US), 7.4 oz./L yd (CA) for a breathable, soft touch

  • 100% U.S. cotton, 30 singles for durability and comfort

  • Ash Grey: 99% cotton, 1% polyester

  • Sport Grey: 90% cotton, 10% black polyester

  • Dark Heather, Graphite Heather & Heather Colors: 50% cotton, 50% polyester

Key Features:
✔ Modern classic fit – A flattering, versatile silhouette
✔ Narrow rib collar – Sleek and stylish neckline
✔ Taped neck & shoulders – Reinforced for durability
✔ Recycled tearaway label – Smooth, tag-free comfort

Sustainability & Ethical Sourcing:
🌱 Made With Respect – Proudly partnered with Better Cotton to support sustainable cotton farming
♻ Eco-conscious dyes – OEKO-TEX® certified low-impact coloring
🚫 Less Plastic Waste – Polybags removed from all colors except White
